hero.title: Premium Interior Architecture
hero.subtitle: Design, technical expertise and artistic sensitivity for your spaces

about.pageDescription: Discover the story and expertise of Amal MARHFOUR, founder of ABS Design
about.title: Premium Interior Architect
about.subtitle: Founder & Director of ABS Design
about.bio: Amal MARHFOUR is a renowned interior architect, founder and director of ABS Design. With over 15 years of experience, she creates spaces that combine luxury, minimalism and technical expertise.
about.philosophyText: Every project is an opportunity to create spaces that tell a story. We believe interior architecture is the art of transforming spaces into sensory experiences.
about.visionText: Creating premium environments where form follows function, where aesthetics meet practicality, and every detail contributes to overall harmony.
about.approachText: Attentive listening, meticulous analysis, innovative design and personal supervision of every project.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We strive for perfection in every detail

values.title: Integrity
values.description: Transparency and honesty with our clients

services.pageDescription: Discover our comprehensive interior architecture and design services
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete solutions for your interior projects
services.description: We offer a comprehensive range of interior architecture and design services to transform your spaces.

services.title: Interior Design
services.description: Complete design of residential and professional spaces. We create elegant and functional environments tailored to your lifestyle.

services.title: 2D / 3D Concept
services.description: Detailed and realistic visualizations of your projects. Technical drawings and 3D renders to validate your vision before work begins.

services.title: Site Supervision
services.description: Personal and meticulous supervision of execution. We ensure compliance with plans and quality of finishes.

services.title: Turnkey Renovation
services.description: Complete end-to-end renovation service. Design, supplies, work and setup - we manage everything.

services.title: Woodwork & Joinery
services.description: Creation of custom furniture and wooden elements. Wardrobes, shelving, doors and personalized layouts.

services.title: Upholstery & Furnishing
services.description: Selection and creation of furniture and textile solutions. Custom covers, slip covers and tapestries.

services.title: Furniture Expertise
services.description: Expert advice on furniture selection and integration. Sourcing of unique pieces and renowned designers.

services.title: Kitchen Design
services.description: Design of modern and functional kitchens. Optimal layout, integrated appliances and refined finishes.

portfolio.pageDescription: Discover our interior architecture and design projects
portfolio.title: Our Projects
portfolio.subtitle: Interior architecture and design realizations

references.pageDescription: Our trusted clients in banking, commercial and residential sectors
references.title: Our References
references.subtitle: Trusted institutions and renowned partners
references.bankingDesc: Recognized expertise in modern and professional banking space design
references.residentialDesc: Prestigious achievements in high-end villas and apartments
references.professionalDesc: Layout solutions for workspaces and commercial areas

testimonials.text: Amal transformed our headquarters into a modern and welcoming space. Her technical expertise and artistic sensitivity are remarkable.
testimonials.author: Management - Partner Bank

testimonials.text: Exemplary professionalism, respected deadlines and impeccable finishes. We highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Project Manager - Professional Sector

contact.pageDescription: Contact us to discuss your interior architecture project
contact.title: Let's Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss your project
contact.description: Have a project in mind? Contact us for an initial consultation with no commitment. We listen, analyze and propose tailored solutions.

form.name: Name

faq.question: What is the timeline for a project?
faq.answer: Timelines vary depending on project complexity. A small project may take 2-3 months, a complete project 6-12 months.

faq.question: Do you work outside Casablanca?
faq.answer: Yes, we work throughout Morocco and also accept international projects.

faq.question: What's the first step?
faq.answer: Contact us for an initial consultation. We will listen to your needs and propose a personalized approach.

footer.about: Premium interior architecture. Luxury, minimalism and technical expertise to transform your spaces.

seo.homeDescription: Discover ABS Design, premium interior architecture by Amal MARHFOUR. Residential, commercial and banking design in Casablanca.
seo.aboutDescription: Discover the story and expertise of Amal MARHFOUR, renowned interior architect and founder of ABS Design.
seo.servicesDescription: Comprehensive interior architecture services: design, 3D concept, supervision, turnkey renovation, woodwork and more.
seo.portfolioDescription: Discover our interior architecture achievements: villas, apartments, offices, banks and more.
